channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [LKPFIN] LKP Finance Ltd Allots 4:1 Bonus Shares to Eligible Members
item.description:
🔥 Trending

LKP Finance Ltd has allotted 6,14,46,600 equity shares as fully paid-up bonus equity shares in the proportion of 4:1, i.e., 4 new fully paid-up equity shares for every 1 existing fully paid-up equity share. The allotment was made to the eligible members whose names appeared in the Register of Members / Register of the Beneficial Owners, as on 06 March 2026, the ‘Record Date’ fixed for this purpose. This allotment has increased the company's paid-up equity share capital from 1,53,61,650 shares to 7,68,08,250 shares.

  • LKP Finance Ltd allotted 6,14,46,600 bonus equity shares
  • The allotment was made in the proportion of 4:1
  • The allotment was made to eligible members as of 06 March 2026
  • The company's paid-up equity share capital increased from 1,53,61,650 to 7,68,08,250 shares

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: LKP Finance Limited | Category: Bonus

item.title: [GBFL] Aditya Enterprise Sells 8,10,000 Shares in Goenka Business & Finance Ltd, Equivalent to 6.23%
item.description:
Aditya Enterprise has sold a total of 8,10,000 shares in Goenka Business & Finance Limited, which amounts to 6.23% of the company’s issued shares. This disclosure was made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The sale was made across all mandates and the details of the acquisition are provided in the appropriate form pursuant to the regulation. The transaction was completed on March 02, 2026.

  • Aditya Enterprise sold 8,10,000 shares in Goenka Business & Finance Limited
  • The sale amounts to 6.23% of the company’s issued shares
  • The sale was made across all mandates
  • The transaction was completed on March 02, 2026
  • The disclosure was made under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Goenka Business & Finance Ltd | Category: Sale

item.title: [SINCLAIR] Sinclairs Hotels Ltd. Reveals Share Acquisition by Navin Chand Suchanti
item.description:
Sinclairs Hotels Ltd. has disclosed the acquisition of shares by Navin Chand Suchanti under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The acquisition took place between 05.03.2026 and 06.03.2026, increasing Suchanti's shareholding to 6.03% from 5.97% through open market transactions. The total equity shares of the company stand at 5,12,60,000, with a value of Rs.2 each, before and after the acquisition.

  • Navin Chand Suchanti, a Promoter, acquires shares in Sinclairs Hotels Ltd.
  • The acquisition occurred between 05.03.2026 and 06.03.2026 through open market transactions.
  • Suchanti's shareholding increased from 5.97% to 6.03% as a result of the acquisition.
  • The total equity shares of the company remain unchanged at 5,12,60,000, with a value of Rs.2 each.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SINCLAIRS HOTELS LTD.-$ | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [LKPFIN] LKP Finance Ltd Allots 6,14,46,600 Bonus Equity Shares in 4:1 Proportion
item.description:
🔥 Trending

LKP Finance Ltd announced the allotment of 6,14,46,600 equity shares as fully paid-up bonus equity shares, in the proportion of 4:1, i.e., 4 new fully paid-up equity shares for every 1 existing fully paid-up equity share. The allotment was made to the eligible members whose names appeared in the Register of Members / Register of the Beneficial Owners, as on 06 March 2026, the ‘Record Date’ fixed for this purpose. The paid-up equity share capital of the Company is increased from 1,53,61,650 15,36,16,500 to 7,68,08,250 76,80,82,500 consequent to the above allotment.

  • LKP Finance Ltd allotted 6,14,46,600 bonus equity shares
  • The allotment was made in the proportion of 4:1
  • The allotment was made to the eligible members as on the Record Date
  • The paid-up equity share capital of the Company is increased to 7,68,08,250 76,80,82,500
  • The allotment was made at the meeting held on 09 March 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: LKP Finance Limited | Category: Bonus

item.title: [SUNSHIEL] Swarna Malhotra Acquires Shares of Sunshield Chemicals Ltd Through Open Market
item.description:
Swarna Malhotra, along with Indus Petrochem Limited, Coppersmith Energies and Project Private Limited, Sudhir Malhotra, and Jeet Malhotra, have acquired shares of Sunshield Chemicals Ltd. The acquisition was made through the open market, and the total holding of the acquirer along with PACs stands at 66.24% after the acquisition. The acquired shares will be subject to encumbrance till redemption.

  • Swarna Malhotra and associated entities acquire shares of Sunshield Chemicals Ltd.
  • The acquisition was made through the open market.
  • The total holding of the acquirer along with PACs stands at 66.24% after the acquisition.
  • The acquired shares will be subject to encumbrance till redemption.
  • The acquisition is in compliance with Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SUNSHIELD CHEMICALS LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [PADALPO] Hemal Rajeshbhai Desai Acquires 0.005% Stake in Padmanabh Alloys & Polymers Ltd as per SEBI Regulations
item.description:
Hemal Rajeshbhai Desai has acquired 271 equity shares of Padmanabh Alloys & Polymers Ltd, as per the disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. This acquisition has resulted in a 0.005% stake in the company. The shares were acquired at Rs. 10/- each, both before and after the acquisition. The total diluted share/voting capital of the company after the acquisition remains at Rs. 10/- each.

  • Hemal Rajeshbhai Desai acquires 271 equity shares of Padmanabh Alloys & Polymers Ltd.
  • The acquisition results in a 0.005% stake in the company.
  • The shares were acquired at Rs. 10/- each, both before and after the acquisition.
  • The total diluted share/voting capital of the company after the acquisition remains at Rs. 10/- each.
  • The acquisition is in compliance with the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations 2011.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PADMANABH ALLOYS & POLYMERS LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [SILVERTUC] Silver Touch Technologies Announces 1:1 Bonus Share Allotment
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Silver Touch Technologies Ltd. has allotted 6,34,05,000 bonus equity shares to its shareholders in a 1:1 ratio. The decision was made at a Board of Directors meeting on March 9, 2026. The new shares will rank pari-passu with the existing shares. The company's paid-up share capital has increased from 12,68,10,000 to 25,36,20,000. The record date for this purpose was March 6, 2026. The information was also shared on the company's website.

  • Silver Touch Technologies has allotted 6,34,05,000 bonus equity shares
  • The bonus shares are issued in a 1:1 ratio
  • The decision was made at a Board of Directors meeting on March 9, 2026
  • The company's paid-up share capital has increased from 12,68,10,000 to 25,36,20,000
  • The record date for this purpose was March 6, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Silver Touch Technologies Ltd | Category: Bonus

item.title: [SMSLIFE] Promoter Group Acquires 0.31% Shares in Haleos Labs Ltd: Regulatory Disclosure
item.description:
The Exchange has received a disclosure under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011 from TV Praveen, a Promoter of Haleos Labs Ltd (formerly known as SMS Lifesciences India Limited). The disclosure pertains to the acquisition of 9,400 equity shares (0.31%) of the company. The acquisition details, pre-and post-acquisition shareholding, and voting rights of the Promoter Group are provided in the disclosure.

  • TV Praveen, a Promoter of Haleos Labs Ltd, has acquired 0.31% shares of the company.
  • The acquisition details are disclosed under Regulation 29(2) of SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
  • The acquisition includes 9,400 equity shares of the company.
  • The disclosure also includes the pre-and post-acquisition shareholding and voting rights of the Promoter Group.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SMS Lifesciences India Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [PURVA] Puravankara Enters Joint Development Project on Hennur Road, Bengaluru with GDV Over ₹ 1,300 Crore
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Puravankara Group, one of India’s leading real estate developers, has entered into a joint development of a 4-acre land parcel on Hennur Road in Bengaluru, with an estimated gross development value (GDV) of over ₹ 1,300 crore. The acquisition aligns with the company’s strategic vision to expand its footprint in key Bengaluru micro-markets that offer robust infrastructure, strong connectivity, and sustained residential demand. The land parcel offers a total saleable area of approximately 0.84 million square feet and is expected to be brought to market within the next 6-12 months.

  • Puravankara Group enters joint development project on Hennur Road, Bengaluru with GDV over ₹ 1,300 crore.
  • The project aligns with the company’s strategic vision to expand in key Bengaluru micro-markets with robust infrastructure and sustained residential demand.
  • The 4-acre land parcel offers a total saleable area of approximately 0.84 million square feet.
  • The project is expected to be brought to market within the next 6-12 months.
  • Puravankara Group has been actively acquiring land parcels in Bengaluru, including a 53.5-acre land parcel in Anekal Taluka and a 24.59-acre parcel at KIADB Hardware Park in North Bengaluru.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Puravankara Ltd | Category: Joint Ventures

item.title: [IXIGO] AbhiBus Partners with Uber to Power Intercity Bus Bookings on Uber App
item.description:
🔥 Trending

AbhiBus, one of India’s leading online bus ticketing platforms and a part of ixigo, has partnered with Uber to enable intercity bus ticket bookings within the Uber app. This partnership provides Uber users with access to AbhiBus’s extensive network of over 6 lakh routes operated by over 6,200 bus operators nationwide. Users can now book bus tickets, check real-time seat availability, select preferred seats, track live bus status, and access 24x7 customer support, all within the Uber app.

  • AbhiBus partners with Uber to power intercity bus bookings within the Uber app.
  • Uber users can now book bus tickets using AbhiBus’s extensive network and booking technology.
  • Users can access over 6 lakh routes and filter by bus types such as AC, Sleeper, Seater, Volvo, and Scania.
  • The partnership expands Uber’s mobility ecosystem beyond intra-city rides, enabling users to plan both short-distance and intercity journeys seamlessly.
  • AbhiBus strengthens its footprint in powering intercity bus travel across diverse platforms, making seamless and reliable bus booking more accessible.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Le Travenues Technology Ltd | Category: Partnership
